content.title: Smooth-Finished Concrete
content.tagline: Sleek, Modern, and Minimal by Design
content.subtitle: Sleek, Modern, and Minimal by Design
content.description: A hand-troweled surface polished to a clean, uniform finish — perfect for modern interiors, garages, and covered outdoor spaces.

content.title: The Most Classic and Versatile Concrete Finish
content.description:
A sleek, polished concrete finish designed for durability, functionality, and a clean professional appearance. Smooth finish concrete is carefully installed and expertly troweled to create a level, uniform surface with minimal texture or imperfections.

Ideal for garages, barns, basements, workshops, and other interior spaces, this finish provides a refined look while maintaining the strength and longevity concrete is known for. Its smooth surface is easy to clean, low maintenance, and built to withstand daily use.

cards.title: Clean, Modern Appearance
cards.subtitle: Creates a sleek and professional look.

cards.title: Durable & Long-Lasting
cards.subtitle: Built to withstand heavy use and wear.

content.title: What Is Smooth Finish Concrete?
content.finalText: This finishing method is ideal for residential and commercial spaces where both safety and aesthetics matter.
content.description: Smooth finish concrete is achieved through a careful troweling process that creates a flat, sleek, and uniform surface with minimal texture. This refined finish is ideal for garages, barns, basements, workshops, and other interior spaces where durability and a clean appearance matter most.

items.text: A sleek, uniform surface creates a polished look that enhances garages, basements, barns, workshops, and commercial spaces.
items.label: Clean, Professional Appearance:

items.text: Installed with Maxima Concrete’s 6.5-bag high-strength mix, smooth finish concrete is built to withstand daily use while maintaining its appearance for years.
items.label: Durable & Long-Lasting:

items.text: The smooth surface is easy to clean, helping reduce dust buildup and making routine maintenance quick and hassle-free.
items.label: Easy Maintenance:

items.text: Ideal for garages, basements, barns, workshops, and utility areas where a clean, functional, and professional finish is desired.
items.label: Perfect for Interior Spaces:

cards.title: Porches & Steps

items.question: What is a smooth (trowel) finish?
items.answer: A smooth finish is troweled to a sleek, even surface, ideal for a clean, modern look.

items.question: Is smooth concrete slippery when wet?
items.answer: It can be more slick than textured finishes, so it's best for covered or indoor areas like garages and basements. We'll recommend the right finish for your space.

items.question: Where does a smooth finish work best?
items.answer: Garage floors, basement floors, and interior slabs where a clean, easy-to-clean surface is the priority.

items.question: How do I maintain a smooth finish?
items.answer: Regular cleaning and periodic resealing keep it looking sharp and protect against stains.
